objective: Harden Cursor native-local-exec: make unset default fail-closed (off) instead of codex-sandbox in resolveCursorNativeExecMode, matching the documented contract; update tests + doc; require explicit opt-in. Report behavior change + re-enable one-liner.

workPhases.title: Fail-closed native-local-exec default (revert 651f298e permissive default) + tests/doc

registry.ts note: revert to fail-closed wording; keep type doc (already off) (B)
Update cursor-native-exec-policy.test.ts: no-setting->off + add unset+declared denies row (B)
